programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Another season of the documentary that shows the lives of people living in Alaska who hunt and prepare for the harsh winter.Temperatures in this area drop to -60 degrees Celsius.

programme.title: Inside the Factory
programme.desc: Paddy McGuinness, Cherry Healey and Ruth Goodman visit factories of products that people eat every day.On site, they learn about the production process of selected products.

programme.title: Empire Builders
programme.desc: Rulers of European empires, including the Ottomans, built fortresses around the Mediterranean Sea.These buildings turned out to be later witnesses of powerful battles and the most important events of the millennium.

programme.title: Treasures Decoded
programme.desc: The creators of the series conduct archaeological investigations into unsolved mysteries of antiquity.The emergence of new evidence gives researchers further opportunities to solve each of them.In each episode, world-class experts from various fields focus on a different archaeological object and search for the truth about its origin.Viewers will learn the latest scientific theories, dramatic stories and surprising answers about the real Tower of Babel, the Egyptian plagues, Stonehenge and the city of Petra.

programme.title: Life Below Zero 6
programme.desc: A story about the everyday life of daredevils who decided to leave their comfortable life and live in one of the most harsh regions in the world.Living in Alaska means constant preparations.The heroes must gather food and hunt to survive the harsh Arctic winter.Sue Aikens begins to worry as she realizes that she is increasingly affected by age-related limitations.Alaska is not a friendly place for older people.Perhaps he will consider moving to a less demanding area.Meanwhile, Jesse prepares his team to compete in the largest sled dog race in the world.They have over 1,500 kilometers to cover.

programme.title: Life Below Zero 8
programme.desc: Despite climate change, the Hailstons do not give up their traditional lifestyle.Sue Aikens creates new tools, and Jessie Holmes and his dogs try to acclimatize to new areas.

programme.title: Treasures Decoded
programme.desc: The creators of the series conduct archaeological investigations into unsolved mysteries of antiquity.The emergence of new evidence gives researchers further opportunities to solve each of them.In each episode, world-class experts from various fields focus on a different archaeological object and search for the truth about its origin.Viewers will learn the latest scientific theories, dramatic stories and surprising answers about the real Tower of Babel, the Egyptian plagues, Stonehenge and the city of Petra.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: A documentary series presenting extraordinary places on Earth.

programme.title: Where the Wild Men Are with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: Traveler Ben Fogle learns the stories of people who decided to abandon their previous city life in favor of existence in the bosom of nature.The program's characters often live in remote areas and in places with extremely harsh conditions.In the ninth season of the program, Ben travels to Portugal, where he visits Alex, who has abandoned a lucrative career in trading to hide in a mountain hideout.The traveler also goes to the Irish wilderness, where an elderly couple, George and Bettina, live.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: In each episode, David Attenborough presents two cases of natural curiosities that have something in common.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Another season of the documentary that shows the lives of people living in Alaska who hunt and prepare for the harsh winter.Temperatures in this area drop to -60 degrees Celsius.

programme.title: Earth
programme.desc: Presenter and naturalist Chris Packham will present the most important moments from the existence of the Blue Planet.The creators will show, among other things, extreme climate changes and continental collisions.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: A documentary series presenting extraordinary places on Earth.

programme.title: Life Below Zero 8
programme.desc: Despite climate change, the Hailstons do not give up their traditional lifestyle.Sue Aikens creates new tools, and Jessie Holmes and his dogs try to acclimatize to new areas.

programme.title: Life Below Zero 8
programme.desc: Despite climate change, the Hailstons do not give up their traditional lifestyle.Sue Aikens creates new tools, and Jessie Holmes and his dogs try to acclimatize to new areas.

programme.title: Treasures Decoded
programme.desc: The creators of the series conduct archaeological investigations into unsolved mysteries of antiquity.The emergence of new evidence gives researchers further opportunities to solve each of them.In each episode, world-class experts from various fields focus on a different archaeological object and search for the truth about its origin.Viewers will learn the latest scientific theories, dramatic stories and surprising answers about the real Tower of Babel, the Egyptian plagues, Stonehenge and the city of Petra.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: A documentary series presenting extraordinary places on Earth.

programme.title: The Planets
programme.desc: Filmmakers take viewers on a breathtaking journey through the solar system.They show, using amazing visual effects, how individual planets were born and evolved.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Another season of the documentary that shows the lives of people living in Alaska who hunt and prepare for the harsh winter.Temperatures in this area drop to -60 degrees Celsius.

programme.title: Where the Wild Men Are with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: Traveler Ben Fogle learns the stories of people who decided to abandon their previous city life in favor of existence in the bosom of nature.The program's characters often live in remote areas and in places with extremely harsh conditions.In the ninth season of the program, Ben travels to Portugal, where he visits Alex, who has abandoned a lucrative career in trading to hide in a mountain hideout.The traveler also goes to the Irish wilderness, where an elderly couple, George and Bettina, live.

programme.title: Earth
programme.desc: Presenter and naturalist Chris Packham will present the most important moments from the existence of the Blue Planet.The creators will show, among other things, extreme climate changes and continental collisions.

programme.title: Treasures Decoded
programme.desc: The creators of the series conduct archaeological investigations into unsolved mysteries of antiquity.The emergence of new evidence gives researchers further opportunities to solve each of them.In each episode, world-class experts from various fields focus on a different archaeological object and search for the truth about its origin.Viewers will learn the latest scientific theories, dramatic stories and surprising answers about the real Tower of Babel, the Egyptian plagues, Stonehenge and the city of Petra.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: Our planet's landmasses are surrounded by shallow seas that are rarely more than 200 meters deep.They are located on continental shelves, stretching even hundreds of kilometers - until the bottom drops out and deeper, lightless waters begin.Together they constitute only eight percent of the world's ocean surface.However, most marine organisms live there.The shallow waters around the equator are perfect for baby whales because they are warm and calm.Few predators swim in them.Most of the tropical shallows have extremely poor waters, while the Great Barrier Reef is rich in marine organisms.These coral shelters are inhabited by countless species of fish, sea snakes and octopuses.The seabed of the shallow waters of Shark Bay in Western Australia is covered with underwater meadows.

programme.title: Wild Catch
programme.desc: The famous adventurer Cyril Chauquet and his team once again set off on a dangerous expedition.Their goal is to find and study the most mysterious and dangerous fish species inhabiting various parts of the world.The team faces predators such as caimans and rays, meets illegal fishermen and traverses treacherous rivers.During this extraordinary journey, they not only look for new discoveries, but also help protect valuable habitats of endangered species.

programme.title: Where the Wild Men Are with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: Traveler Ben Fogle learns the stories of people who decided to abandon their previous city life in favor of existence in the bosom of nature.The program's characters often live in remote areas and in places with extremely harsh conditions.In the ninth season of the program, Ben travels to Portugal, where he visits Alex, who has abandoned a lucrative career in trading to hide in a mountain hideout.The traveler also goes to the Irish wilderness, where an elderly couple, George and Bettina, live.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Another season of the documentary that shows the lives of people living in Alaska who hunt and prepare for the harsh winter.Temperatures in this area drop to -60 degrees Celsius.

programme.title: Australia's Health Revolution with Michael Mosley
programme.desc: Dr. Michael Mosley and physiologist Ray Kelly challenge people suffering from type 2 diabetes with an eating plan that can improve the symptoms of their disease in just a few days.Viewers will find out whether a radical diet based on numerous scientific studies can be the key to controlling the diabetes epidemic in Australia.For the good of humanity, Mosley also decides to experience the effects of a certain diet for himself.The doctor follows a menu consisting of sweet carbohydrates and saturated fats.He wants to make viewers aware of the impact of processed food on human health.

programme.title: Treasures Decoded
programme.desc: The creators of the series conduct archaeological investigations into unsolved mysteries of antiquity.The emergence of new evidence gives researchers further opportunities to solve each of them.In each episode, world-class experts from various fields focus on a different archaeological object and search for the truth about its origin.Viewers will learn the latest scientific theories, dramatic stories and surprising answers about the real Tower of Babel, the Egyptian plagues, Stonehenge and the city of Petra.

programme.title: Life Below Zero 8
programme.desc: Despite climate change, the Hailstons do not give up their traditional lifestyle.Sue Aikens creates new tools, and Jessie Holmes and his dogs try to acclimatize to new areas.

programme.title: Life Below Zero 8
programme.desc: Despite climate change, the Hailstons do not give up their traditional lifestyle.Sue Aikens creates new tools, and Jessie Holmes and his dogs try to acclimatize to new areas.

programme.title: Treasures Decoded
programme.desc: The creators of the series conduct archaeological investigations into unsolved mysteries of antiquity.The emergence of new evidence gives researchers further opportunities to solve each of them.In each episode, world-class experts from various fields focus on a different archaeological object and search for the truth about its origin.Viewers will learn the latest scientific theories, dramatic stories and surprising answers about the real Tower of Babel, the Egyptian plagues, Stonehenge and the city of Petra.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: A documentary series presenting extraordinary places on Earth.

programme.title: Where the Wild Men Are with Ben Fogle

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: The documentaries present a side of the Galapagos Islands that is not widely known.They explain why they are so important to understanding evolutionary history.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Another season of the documentary that shows the lives of people living in Alaska who hunt and prepare for the harsh winter.Temperatures in this area drop to -60 degrees Celsius.

programme.title: Islands: Nature's Wild Laboratories
programme.desc: The creators of the series take viewers on a journey through the unique ecosystems of islands, from the Arctic to the tropics.The trek includes Borneo, the Okavango Delta, Vancouver Islands, Baffin Island, K'gari and Sri Lanka.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: A documentary series presenting extraordinary places on Earth.

programme.title: Life Below Zero 8
programme.desc: Despite climate change, the Hailstons do not give up their traditional lifestyle.Sue Aikens creates new tools, and Jessie Holmes and his dogs try to acclimatize to new areas.

programme.title: Life Below Zero 8
programme.desc: Despite climate change, the Hailstons do not give up their traditional lifestyle.Sue Aikens creates new tools, and Jessie Holmes and his dogs try to acclimatize to new areas.

programme.title: Treasures Decoded
programme.desc: The creators of the series conduct archaeological investigations into unsolved mysteries of antiquity.The emergence of new evidence gives researchers further opportunities to solve each of them.In each episode, world-class experts from various fields focus on a different archaeological object and search for the truth about its origin.Viewers will learn the latest scientific theories, dramatic stories and surprising answers about the real Tower of Babel, the Egyptian plagues, Stonehenge and the city of Petra.

programme.desc: Filmmakers take viewers on a breathtaking journey through the solar system.They show, using amazing visual effects, how individual planets were born and evolved.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Another season of the documentary that shows the lives of people living in Alaska who hunt and prepare for the harsh winter.Temperatures in this area drop to -60 degrees Celsius.

programme.title: Where the Wild Men Are with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: Traveler Ben Fogle learns the stories of people who decided to abandon their previous city life in favor of existence in the bosom of nature.The program's characters often live in remote areas and in places with extremely harsh conditions.In the ninth season of the program, Ben travels to Portugal, where he visits Alex, who has abandoned a lucrative career in trading to hide in a mountain hideout.The traveler also goes to the Irish wilderness, where an elderly couple, George and Bettina, live.

programme.title: Islands: Nature's Wild Laboratories
programme.desc: The creators of the series take viewers on a journey through the unique ecosystems of islands, from the Arctic to the tropics.The trek includes Borneo, the Okavango Delta, Vancouver Islands, Baffin Island, K'gari and Sri Lanka.

programme.title: Treasures Decoded
programme.desc: The creators of the series conduct archaeological investigations into unsolved mysteries of antiquity.The emergence of new evidence gives researchers further opportunities to solve each of them.In each episode, world-class experts from various fields focus on a different archaeological object and search for the truth about its origin.Viewers will learn the latest scientific theories, dramatic stories and surprising answers about the real Tower of Babel, the Egyptian plagues, Stonehenge and the city of Petra.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: Trees are among the most wonderful creations of nature.The most extensive forests on our planet are deciduous and coniferous forests, growing in the zone of changing seasons.They managed to control such large areas thanks to their ability to survive the changes of seasons.The further from the North Pole, the more dominant the role of trees in the landscape becomes.Most of them are in the taiga, although development opportunities there are extremely difficult.In this respect, conditions in Californian forests are more favorable, where trees reach enormous sizes.In the nearby mountains you can admire the oldest organisms on our planet - ancient pines.Some have been growing there for up to five thousand years.

programme.title: Sue Perkins Into Alaska
programme.desc: Actress Sue Perkins sets off on a journey through Alaska, the largest American state, famous for its harsh climate and wildlife.The expedition begins in the most populated city, Anchorage.

programme.title: Where the Wild Men Are with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: Traveler Ben Fogle learns the stories of people who decided to abandon their previous city life in favor of existence in the bosom of nature.The program's characters often live in remote areas and in places with extremely harsh conditions.In the ninth season of the program, Ben travels to Portugal, where he visits Alex, who has abandoned a lucrative career in trading to hide in a mountain hideout.The traveler also goes to the Irish wilderness, where an elderly couple, George and Bettina, live.
